junior_data_analyst_prague.body: Junior Data Analyst in Prague typically earns 45 000 to 70 000 CZK gross per month.
Prague junior data analyst salary range is commonly 50 000 to 75 000 CZK per month.
Entry data analyst roles in Czechia cluster around 48 000 to 72 000 CZK monthly.

data_scientist_prague.body: Data Scientist in Prague commonly ranges from 95 000 to 145 000 CZK gross per month.
Mid-level data scientist salaries in Prague are usually 90 000 to 140 000 CZK monthly.
Czech data scientist compensation often falls between 85 000 and 135 000 CZK per month.

staff_mle_prague.body: Staff Machine Learning Engineer in Prague senior roles often pay 180 000 to 260 000 CZK gross monthly.
Senior staff ML engineering compensation in Prague is typically 170 000 to 250 000 CZK per month.
Principal and staff software or ML engineers in Prague can exceed 200 000 CZK monthly total pay.

senior_manager_prague.body: Head of Data and senior data management roles in Prague often range 180 000 to 280 000 CZK monthly.
Data science manager salaries in Prague commonly land between 160 000 and 240 000 CZK per month.
Senior data managers in Czechia are benchmarked around 150 000 to 230 000 CZK gross per month.

generic_cz_data.body: Data roles in Prague vary from 70 000 to 180 000 CZK gross per month by seniority.
Czech data salaries rise with seniority, with senior profiles often above 140 000 CZK monthly.
Market data for Czech data roles shows broad monthly bands across analyst and senior tracks.
